race.description: Home Of Country Racing F&M Hcp (58)
race.comment: IN GREAT SPIRIT (2) raced up on the speed and dug deep to be beaten just a length last start over 1350m at Ipswich. Very fit after four runs back from a spell. Will race handy and prove tough to get past around this tight circuit. ALL TOO FOXY (11) returned from a nine-week break with a win two back at Warwick then she floundered in heavy going at Ipswich last time. Worth another chance back on firmer ground. CONSTANT CAFE (1) produced an eye-catcher first-up over 1100m at this track, making up a few lengths to finish a close fourth. A wide gate makes it tough but out to this trip with a run under the belt she should be thereabouts. PRIVALOVA (3) has been a bit plain in her two runs this time in work. Drops a little in grade this time and can improve at the third run back. LENNYSTAR (12) was runner-up in a similar race here a fortnight ago. Doesn't win out of turn but she is a good each-way hope in an even contest.
